title: cystopteris fragilis var. dickieana
intro: Cystopteris fragilis var. dickieana, also known as Dickie's brittle fern, is a rare and endangered variety of fern found in the British Isles, characterized by its delicate fronds and distinctive leaf shape. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dickie's brittle fern include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health complaints.
